items.name: 7's House Latte
items.description: Double espresso pulled from single-estate Uva beans, steamed milk, finished with a leaf of latte art.

items.name: Hill Country Love Cake
items.description: Cashews, semolina and rosewater, baked slow the traditional way and cut generously for the road ahead.

items.name: Spiced Fish Cutlet Snack Box
items.description: Four crisp fish cutlets, a wedge of lime and house chili sauce — built to eat with one hand at a rest stop.
